subcodes.first_line: O ye faithful friends and maidservants of the Merciful! Verily ye are self-sacrificing… the skillful farmer always hath an abundance of crops and harvests
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و اماء رحمن باوفا انصاف اینست که در سبیل ملکوت جانفشانید و جز انتشار
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
